ksa_text: Knowledge of AI ethics principles and fairness evaluation methods, including bias detection and measurement techniques, fairness metrics, representativeness assessment, and the relationship between training data characteristics and model equity outcomes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: AI & ML Infrastructure (affinity 0.30) with insufficient REG signals (0). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.3947). AI Lifecycle Manager interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Lifecycle Manager.
